name: chain_how_we_automated_linkedin_lead_gen_using
method: How we automated LinkedIn lead gen using keyword triggers (without getting banned) Cold LinkedIn DMs are dying. In 2026, the average reply rate is under 2%, and the spam filters are more aggressive th

stages.task: Playwright scrapes LinkedIn feed/search for buying-signal keywords: 'recommend', 'looking for', 'anyone use', 'best tool for', 'switching from'. Extracts post URL, author, text, comment count, timestamp.

Claude scores each post 1-10 on: intent clarity, poster seniority (decision maker?), post recency (<48h), comment opportunity (not already dominated). Filter to score>=7. Dedup against Pinecone (already engaged?). Output qualified targets.

Claude generates contextual expert comment for each qualified post. Comment style: specific insight + soft credibility signal, no pitch, no CTA. Posts via Playwright. Rate limit: max 8 comments/session, 2h gaps between sessions.
24h after engagement: check comment for replies. If replied, score reply sentiment. If positive/curious, flag for manual DM follow-up. Append to AUTOMATIONS/leads/linkedin_warm_leads.csv.
